author: Dexterity104
title: Concurrent breadth-first miner with second-pass sharpening
notes: A general high/critical vulnerability miner for the sn60__bitsec/miner lane across Solidity, Vyper, Rust, Move and Cairo. It ranks the project's own source, dispatches many focused single-file audits concurrently alongside a whole-repository survey, adversarial re-reads, and model-free structural checks, then runs a second sharpening pass over the flagged functions - re-reading each function's exact source to turn vaguely-stated candidates into precisely-anchored ones. Independent reviews are folded together and the most corroborated, sharply-localized issues lead the report; each finding is pinned to an exact file and function. Decoding is deterministic. Self-contained, stdlib-only, with no hardcoded or project-specific content.
